title: Terminated employee account still active

servicenow_seed.short_description: [TRAINING] Terminated employee account still active in M365
servicenow_seed.description: Manager reports a terminated employee can still sign into M365 and Teams two days after the end date. HR confirmed termination yesterday.

correct_steps: Confirm HR termination record (date, manager, ticket)
Disable the account immediately, revoke active tokens, force sign-out everywhere
Capture device list and last sign-in times
Escalate to IAM + Security Operations for full deprovisioning, license removal, and access review
Notify the manager when containment is complete
rationale: An active account after termination is both a Security event and an IAM process gap. Contain first (disable + revoke), then hand off to IAM and SecOps for the full off-board and audit.
hints: Containment first: disable and revoke. Investigation second.
Always capture device list and sign-in history before tokens expire.
learning_objectives: Treat off-board gaps as a security event, not a paperwork issue

tool_clues.ad: Account: Active. Last sign-in: 4 hours ago from personal device. Manager-of-record: J. Smith.
tool_clues.security: No suspicious activity flagged yet. Full audit required.
